card_description: God is a historical figure referenced in Philip K. Dick's Exegesis. Context: "Dick rejects the common Christian emphasis on suffering, arguing that Christ's purpose was to alter the ontology of the world."

linked_segments.summary: Dick rejects the common Christian emphasis on suffering, arguing that Christ's purpose was to alter the ontology of the world. He discovers a "steganographic" message—the word **"Felix"**—embedded in
